title: Police Investigation of Former Prince Andrew Examines Reports of Sexual Misconduct
summary_full: A British police force said it was assessing a report that a woman had been taken to an address in Windsor in 2010 for sexual purposes. No charges have been filed.
summary_public: A British police force said it was assessing a report that a woman had been taken to an address in Windsor in 2010 for sexual purposes. No charges have been filed.
